meta.title: AoD Podcast | Can a US Arsenal of Democracy Handle Conflicts on Three Fronts? (feat. Jack Detsch)
meta.description:
With Ukraine in Europe, Israel and Gaza in the Middle East, and Taiwann in the Indo-Pacific, the United States is staring down the barrel of wars in three different regions around the globe. Can America's modern Arsenal of Democracy support rising conflicts? If it can't, are there enough allies with vested interests to join the efforts? Foreign Policy's Jack Detsch joins host Marshall Kosloff to answer these questions and more. 

Read Jack's piece: https://foreignpolicy.com/2024/01/04/united-states-pentagon-defense-industrial-base-china-taiwan-ukraine-israel/
